title: Tangy Creamy Peruvian Myeongnan Roe Causa Limena
description: A fermented and creamy Peruvian dish featuring myeongnan-roe, perfect for a brunch mood, this vegetarian-friendly causa limena is pressure-cooked to perfection.
instructions: Rinse the myeongnan-roe and soak it in water for 30 minutes.
Drain and rinse the myeongnan-roe, then chop it into small pieces.
Pressure-cook the diced potatoes for 10 minutes, or until they are tender.
In a blender or food processor, combine the cooked potatoes, onion, garlic, and aji amarillo peppers, and blend until smooth.
In a bowl, mix together the blended potato mixture, chopped myeongnan-roe, vegan mayonnaise, lime juice, and salt.
Taste and adjust the seasoning as needed.
Spoon the mixture into individual serving cups or a large serving dish.
Chill the causa limena in the refrigerator for at least 30 minutes before serving.
